title: John Ambler
compiled_truth: John Ambler is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-20 to 2002-03-19), John Ambler sent 43 and received 316 emails, totalling 359 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (20), [Karen Denne](people/karen-denne) (14), [Mark Koenig](people/mark-koenig) (14), [Paula Rieker](people/paula-rieker) (12), [Mark Palmer](people/mark-palmer) (10).
